title: Leonardo AI Cheat Sheet
description: A practical guide for everyday users of Leonardo AI for image generation.

commands.command: Generate an image of a sunset
commands.description: Creates a digital image of a sunset scene.
commands.scenario: When you need a beautiful sunset image for a project.

commands.command: Create a logo with a modern look
commands.description: Designs a modern-style logo.
commands.scenario: When starting a new business and need a logo.

commands.command: Enhance image quality
commands.description: Improves the resolution and clarity of an existing image.
commands.scenario: When an image looks blurry or pixelated.

commands.command: Convert photo to sketch
commands.description: Transforms a photo into a pencil sketch style.
commands.scenario: When you want an artistic version of a photo.

commands.command: Add a vintage filter to this image
commands.description: Applies a vintage-style filter to an image.
commands.scenario: When you want an old-fashioned look for an image.

commands.command: Generate a fantasy landscape
commands.description: Creates a digital image of a fantasy landscape.
commands.scenario: When you need a creative background for a game or story.

commands.command: Design a poster for an event
commands.description: Creates a promotional poster for an event.
commands.scenario: When organizing an event and need a poster.

commands.command: Create a cartoon avatar
commands.description: Generates a cartoon-style avatar from a photo.
commands.scenario: When you want a fun profile picture.

commands.command: Remove background from image
commands.description: Eliminates the background from an image, leaving only the subject.
commands.scenario: When you need a transparent background for an image.

commands.command: Generate an abstract art piece
commands.description: Creates an abstract digital artwork.
commands.scenario: When you need unique art for a project or decoration.

commands.command: Create a 3D model of a product
commands.description: Designs a 3D model for a product concept.
commands.scenario: When prototyping a new product design.

commands.command: Generate a realistic portrait
commands.description: Creates a lifelike digital portrait from a description.
commands.scenario: When you need a realistic image of a person.

commands.command: Apply a watercolor effect to this image
commands.description: Adds a watercolor painting effect to an image.
commands.scenario: When you want a soft, artistic look for an image.

commands.command: Generate a sci-fi cityscape
commands.description: Creates a digital image of a futuristic city.
commands.scenario: When you need a sci-fi themed background.

commands.command: Create a collage from these images
commands.description: Combines multiple images into a single collage.
commands.scenario: When you want to present several images together creatively.

commands.command: Use 'Negative Prompts' to exclude specific elements like 'blurry, distorted hands, or text'
commands.description: Add unwanted elements to the negative prompt box to refine the output and avoid common AI artifacts.

commands.command: Adjust 'Guidance Scale' to control prompt adherence
commands.description: Increase the scale to make the AI follow your text more strictly, or decrease it to allow for more creative freedom.

commands.command: Utilize 'Image Guidance' for pose or depth control
commands.description: Upload a reference image and select 'Depth' or 'Edge' to force the AI to follow a specific structure or silhouette.

commands.command: Apply 'Alchemy' mode for high-fidelity textures
commands.description: Toggle Alchemy on to use Leonardo's advanced pipeline for superior lighting, detail, and composition.

commands.command: Use 'Prompt Magic' to expand short descriptions
commands.description: Enable Prompt Magic to let the AI automatically add descriptive keywords to your simple prompts for more cinematic results.
